scenes.title: STOP CLEANING FOR HOURS
scenes.caption: Painting or sanding? Stop paying for cleanup time after every job.
scenes.spoken_text: Painting or sanding? Stop paying for cleanup time after every job.

scenes.title: TAPE FIRST
scenes.caption: Keep the clear film folded and press the built-in yellow tape firmly first.
scenes.spoken_text: Keep the clear film folded and press the built-in yellow tape firmly first.

scenes.title: PULL DOWN TO COVER
scenes.caption: Once the tape is secure, pull the connected clear film over tile and countertop.
scenes.spoken_text: Once the tape is secure, pull the connected clear film over tile and countertop.

scenes.title: KEEP PAINT OFF FINISHES
scenes.caption: Spray paint and sanding dust land on the film, not the finished surfaces.
scenes.spoken_text: Spray paint and sanding dust land on the film, not the finished surfaces.

scenes.title: TAKE THE MESS WITH YOU
scenes.caption: Peel the dirty covering away, and the cleanup leaves with the film.
scenes.spoken_text: Peel the dirty covering away, and the cleanup leaves with the film.

scenes.title: MASK FASTER
scenes.caption: Mask the work zone in fewer steps and keep the project moving.
scenes.spoken_text: Mask the work zone in fewer steps and keep the project moving.

scenes.title: ONE INTEGRATED ROLL
scenes.caption: The yellow tape is already joined to the folded clear PE film.
scenes.spoken_text: The yellow tape is already joined to the folded clear PE film.

scenes.title: PRESS ONCE THEN PULL
scenes.caption: Press the tape once, then pull the film down in one smooth motion.
scenes.spoken_text: Press the tape once, then pull the film down in one smooth motion.

scenes.title: FIX AND TEAR BY HAND
scenes.caption: Stretch it, fix the far edge, and tear the material cleanly by hand.
scenes.spoken_text: Stretch it, fix the far edge, and tear the material cleanly by hand.

scenes.title: MOVE TO THE NEXT JOB
scenes.caption: After spraying, peel everything away and move straight to the next job.
scenes.spoken_text: After spraying, peel everything away and move straight to the next job.

scenes.title: TWO MATERIALS ONE SYSTEM
scenes.caption: One roll combines yellow masking tape with transparent PE film.
scenes.spoken_text: One roll combines yellow masking tape with transparent PE film.

scenes.title: PERMANENTLY CONNECTED
scenes.caption: The tape and film stay permanently connected while you position the roll.
scenes.spoken_text: The tape and film stay permanently connected while you position the roll.

scenes.title: SECURE THE YELLOW EDGE
scenes.caption: Keep the film folded and secure the yellow edge before unfolding anything.
scenes.spoken_text: Keep the film folded and secure the yellow edge before unfolding anything.

scenes.title: UNFOLD THE CLEAR BARRIER
scenes.caption: Then unfold the clear film to build a barrier over the work surface.
scenes.spoken_text: Then unfold the clear film to build a barrier over the work surface.

scenes.title: REMOVE THE WHOLE SYSTEM
scenes.caption: After the work, tape, film, paint, and dust all leave together.
scenes.spoken_text: After the work, tape, film, paint, and dust all leave together.

scenes.title: A PRO'S FIRST CHOICE
scenes.caption: On renovation jobs, I use one roll to mask faster and cleaner.
scenes.spoken_text: On renovation jobs, I use one roll to mask faster and cleaner.

scenes.title: MY FIRST STEP IS TAPE
scenes.caption: My first step is pressing the yellow tape firmly along the edge.
scenes.spoken_text: My first step is pressing the yellow tape firmly along the edge.

scenes.title: THEN I COVER THE AREA
scenes.caption: Only after it is secure do I pull the clear film down.
scenes.spoken_text: Only after it is secure do I pull the clear film down.

scenes.title: READY FOR SPRAYING
scenes.caption: I fix the far edge, tear by hand, and start spraying.
scenes.spoken_text: I fix the far edge, tear by hand, and start spraying.

scenes.title: THE FINISH STAYS CLEAN
scenes.caption: The mess peels away, and the finished surface stays clean underneath.
scenes.spoken_text: The mess peels away, and the finished surface stays clean underneath.

scenes.title: DIRTY FILM CLEAN VANITY
scenes.caption: This dirty film carried the paint, while the vanity stayed clean.
scenes.spoken_text: This dirty film carried the paint, while the vanity stayed clean.

scenes.title: START AT THE VANITY EDGE
scenes.caption: For the next section, press the connected yellow tape along the edge first.
scenes.spoken_text: For the next section, press the connected yellow tape along the edge first.

scenes.title: DROP THE FILM AFTERWARD
scenes.caption: After the tape holds, pull the transparent film down over tile and fixtures.
scenes.spoken_text: After the tape holds, pull the transparent film down over tile and fixtures.

scenes.title: LET THE BARRIER GET DIRTY
scenes.caption: Sanding dust and paint settle on the barrier instead of the bathroom.
scenes.spoken_text: Sanding dust and paint settle on the barrier instead of the bathroom.

scenes.title: PEEL BACK TO CLEAN
scenes.caption: Peel away the used covering and reveal the clean surface underneath.
scenes.spoken_text: Peel away the used covering and reveal the clean surface underneath.
